title: tagetes sinuata
intro: Tagetes sinuata, also known as the narrow-leaved marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tagetes sinuata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Tagetes sinuata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for skin and wound care, as well as for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
